# BP-120 negative: Fiber BodyParser errors stop the handler.
lang: go
file: BP-120-safe.go
variant: fiber
---
package sample

import "github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"

type Request struct {
	Token string `json:"token"`
}

func create(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	var request Request
	if err := c.BodyParser(&request); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return c.SendStatus(204)
}
